MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-20-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT MARY KRUPANSKY'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR AS FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT WAS FILED ON SEPTEMBER 23, 2008. Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189 (301/PHA)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-15-2008 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-15-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andres Sanchez for 50 Golden Gate Apartments, who is present.
Hope Greenhill for Mary Krupansky, who is present.

Settlement conference held. Parties entered into signed agreement, which was filed with this court. Settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for premises located at 50 Golden Gate Ave., #508, San Francisco, CA. See Scanned Document.

Judge Pro Tem Alexander Anolik, Clerk Melinka Jones, not reported. (218)
